railroad_name: HART Railroad, Pittsburgh & Chartiers Valley Division

car_home_yard._comment: Freight cars home at south_yard_code. pohc/csx yard codes are interchange routing only (shipments, empty returns, offline mapping).

car_home_split._comment: south_only = all non-coke freight at South Yard (baseline). demand = split by shipment endpoint demand (island/IX). ix_focus = interchange yards only for car codes with IX/offline demand; island-heavy codes stay South. moderate = cap interchange share at moderate_interchange_pct of each code's fleet.

routing_instructions.North Yard: Outbound coke staging — CK1 to South Yard scale when authorized.
routing_instructions.West Yard: D749 terminates here at end of session after return from Demmler.
routing_instructions.Scully Yard: POHC interchange — NVL picks up its block here at session start; STG-SCULLY runs end-of-session offline shuffle.
routing_instructions.McKees Rocks-PA: POHC offline party tracks — STG-SCULLY stages blocks after the operating session.
routing_instructions.Shenango Coke Works: Coke plant on Neville Island — CK1 picks coke blocks for weighing and resort at South Yard scale.
routing_instructions.Neville Island: Island industries — NVL delivers and pulls; cars remain spotted here between sessions.
routing_instructions.South Yard:
Classification hub and session start point.
D749 sets out inbound Demmler block here to begin ops.
NVL exchanges blocks with D749 (Demmler-bound off, Island-bound on).
routing_instructions.Demmler Yard: CSX interchange — D749 picks up inbound block at session start; STG-DEMMLER runs end-of-session offline shuffle.
routing_instructions.Mckeesport-PA: CSX offline party tracks — STG-DEMMLER stages blocks after the operating session.

session_start: Generate new car orders each session (soft cap via workflow max_new; coke bulk lanes run separately).
D749 picks up all cars with orders at Demmler Yard and runs to South Yard.
D749 sets out the inbound block at South Yard — the operating session begins here.
Yardmaster and engineer swap blocks; D749 departs South Yard westbound.
NVL simultaneously assigns its block at Scully Yard and waits for D749 to cross the bridge with its load.
during_session: NVL comes to South Yard, sets out Demmler-bound blocks, picks up D749 blocks for Neville Island, and works the island industries and Shenango Coke Works.
NVL returns outbound loads and post-unload empties from Neville Island to their next loading or unloading locations, then sets remaining Scully-bound traffic at Scully Yard.
CK1 picks up the coke block from Shenango Coke Works, runs to South Yard scale for weighing, and resorts cars for outgoing trains.
D749 returns from Demmler with a fresh block and terminates in West Yard for the night.
session_end: After D749 secures in West Yard, STG-SCULLY and STG-DEMMLER shuffle cars between interchange yards and offline party tracks.
Loads and unloads complete at offline facilities as cars are staged.

process_chemical_hazmat.Argon: HAZMAT: Class 2.2 Non-flammable gas; UN1006; Placard Non-Flammable Gas; 1 spacer from loco/caboose/passenger
process_chemical_hazmat.Caustic Soda: HAZMAT: Class 8 Corrosive; UN1824; Placard Corrosive; Do not place adjacent to food or reefers

process_chemical_hazmat.Hydrochloric Acid: HAZMAT: Class 8 Corrosive; UN1789; Placard Corrosive; Do not place adjacent to food or reefers

process_chemical_hazmat.Phosphor Compounds: HAZMAT: Class 4.1 Flammable solid; UN1381; Placard Flammable Solid; Do not hump; 2 spacers from occupied equipment
process_chemical_hazmat.Phosphoric Acid: HAZMAT: Class 8 Corrosive; UN1805; Placard Corrosive; Do not place adjacent to food or reefers

process_chemical_hazmat.Styrene Monomer: HAZMAT: Class 3 Flammable liquid; UN2054; Placard Flammable; Do not hump; 1 spacer from loco/caboose/passenger

shipment_car_code_overrides._comment: Per-lane car-type overrides applied after commodity-based AAR selection. Spread coal across the idle HT fleet so it does not overload the 3-car HK pool.

shipment_yard_balance._comment: Auto-balance Demmler vs Scully shipment intervals from forecast demand routed through each interchange yard vs available home-yard fleet.

jobs.name: D749
jobs.description:
Turn from Neville Island to McKeesport.

Departure Instructions:
1. Retrieve power from engine terminal. Top off fuel and sand.
2. Pickup train from West Yard with consist from previous shift.
3. Interchange cars at South Yard following yardmaster instructions.
4. Depart Neville Island. Wait for dispatcher clearance to cross the bridge.

Arrival Instructions:
1. Return from McKeesport with inbound cars.
2. Follow yardmaster instructions for arrival in West Yard or South Yard.
3. Park engine in terminal.

jobs.name: NVL
jobs.description:
POHC Neville Island Local

Deliver inbound cars and interchange with CSX


DURING SESSION:
1. After D749 clears the bridge, run to South Yard with dispatcher clearance.
2. Interchange cars at South Yard following yardmaster instructions.
3. Work the local Neville Island industries and Shenango Coke Works.
4. Return to South Yard; Perform final interchange following yardmaster instructions.
5. Depart Neville Island. Wait for dispatcher clearance to cross the bridge.

jobs.name: CK1
jobs.description:
Coke Transfer

1. Calibrate track scale using the scale test car.
2. Pick up cars to be reloaded at Shenango Coke Works
1. Set out reloads and pick up outgoing coke cars from shipping tracks.
2. Run to South Yard Scale located on the West Lead of South Yard.
3. Weigh track string via CIM scale at a continuous, steady 4 MPH—keep cars fully stretched and do not apply brakes.
4. Record the actual weight and reassign imbalanced cars to RELOAD car orders.   
4. Set out all cars in South Yard to be classified.

Refer to HART Railroad Scale Operating Instructions for calibration and usage details.
